notes: v0.6.5 — fix two click-related dead spots. (1) Recent Renders thumbnails (and Templates / History thumbnails too) had `onclick="sketchup.open_url(#{x.to_json})"` where the to_json's outer double-quotes collided with the attribute's outer double-quotes — the browser saw a malformed attribute and silently dropped the handler. Now CGI.escapeHTML the inner JSON so attribute parsing stays clean. (2) New action callbacks added in 0.6.4 (load_remote_prompt) didn't fire after silent auto-update because callback registration only ran once at HtmlDialog creation. Extracted into attach_tray_callbacks; called both on first show AND after every hot-reload's set_html refresh. add_action_callback replaces by name, so re-attaching existing callbacks is idempotent. Future feature buttons added in newer plugin versions will now wire up correctly without forcing a SU restart.
